subtitle: BSc Computer Science & AI
headline:
ML Engineer
Co-Founder at Nordlys Labs
bioMarkdown:
Hi, I'm Mohamed, Co-Founder & ML Research Lead at ![Nordlys Logo](/icon/nordlys_logo.png) [Nordlys Labs](https://www.nordlyslabs.com/), building intelligent LLM routing systems that select the best model for each task — reducing inference costs by 50–60% and scaling to 500+ users.

I'm a 3rd-year Computer Science & AI student at ![RHUL Logo](/icon/rhul.png) [Royal Holloway, University of London](https://www.royalholloway.ac.uk/) with First-Class Honours. My work spans ML research (transformer attention mechanisms, adversarial robustness), data science (sports analytics at ![Stats Perform Logo](/icon/statsperform.png) [Stats Perform](https://www.statsperform.com/)), and teaching.

You can find more about my background in my [CV](./Mohamed_Atoui_CV.pdf).

**Interests:** Machine Learning, LLM Systems, Applied AI, Product Development.
blogTagline: Thoughts on AI, machine learning, and more.
